title: helianthemum variabile
intro: Helianthemum variabile, also known as rockrose or sunrose, is a flowering plant species in the family Cistaceae, native to mountainous and rocky areas in Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting respiratory health. Helianthemum variabile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
